The **Turkey men's national under-18 and under-19 basketball team** ([Turkish](/wiki/Turkish_language "Turkish language"): *Ümit Milli Basketbol Takımı*) is the national representative for [Turkey](/wiki/Turkey "Turkey") in international under-18 and under-19 men's [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") tournaments. They are formed and run by the [Turkish Basketball Federation](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Federation "Turkish Basketball Federation").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

The team regularly competes at the [FIBA U18 EuroBasket](/wiki/FIBA_U18_EuroBasket "FIBA U18 EuroBasket"), and also won two bronze medals at the [FIBA U19 World Cup](/wiki/FIBA_Under-19_Basketball_World_Cup "FIBA Under-19 Basketball World Cup").
